v0.1.0.description:
Alpha release of the La-Mulana 2 APWorld.

This port features most functionalities of (and depends on) the original randomizer by Coookie93. 
(https://github.com/Coookie93/LaMulana2Randomizer)

Due to the addition of AP items and different item distribution (forward fill instead of assumed fill), several options may lead to unbeatable seeds. This is still a work in progress but it's stable enough to produce beatable runs and calls FillError whenever the final boss cannot be reached. Currently the highest rate of seeds failing is when Randomized Dissonance is off with a non Village of Departure start, or when using full entrance randomization with starts in Hall of Malice and Ancient Chaos, or just due to orphaned islands with bosses in general.

**_Please set up the LaMulana2Archipelago BepInEx Mod prior to setting up the APWorld._**
https://github.com/Crownmuri/LaMulana2Archipelago

# How to Play 
1. Download the APWorld and install it (putting it into the `archipelago/custom_worlds` folder)
2. Download and LM2 YAML template and put it into the `archipelago/Players folder` after adjusting your name and preferred settings
3. Generate the seed and hope it doesn't result in a FillError 
4. The output will contain an `AP_[#####]_P[#]_[PlayerName].lm2r` seed file
5. Rename your seed file to `seed.lm2r` and put it in the original LaMulana2Randomizer's seed folder:
`..\Steam\steamapps\common\La-Mulana 2\LaMulana2Randomizer\Seed`
6. Launch the game.
7. LaMulana2Archipelago will automatically attempt to connect to `localhost:38281` with slotname `Lumisa` first, if that fails, you can manually fill in the server, name and password in the GUI in the main menu.
8. Once you're connected you're good to go!

# Ported Features
Same seed writing structure as the original randomizer. This means that the most options are ported:
- Starting Items (Holy Grail, FDC, Hand Scanner, Shell Horn, Codices, Ring, Maps/Software (available at start is untested)
- Randomized Mantras / Shops / Research / Dissonance (switching to Guardians) / Cursed Chests
- Option to remove Maps / Research / excess Skulls (replaced by filler)
- Randomized Starting Weapon / Starting Area
- Logic appends: FDC required / HoM Life Sigil required / DLC item usage / Costume Clip (untested)
- Hard Logic (untested) / Echidna Type (untested)
- Quality of Life features (auto-scan / auto-skulls / starting money & weights / chest colors)
- Entrance Randomization (horizontal / vertical / gates / soul gates / randomized souls / mixed transitions) [may lead to unbeatable seed generation FillError especially when accessibility is set to 'items']

# New Features
- Guardian Specific Ankh Jewels 
This will append Ankh Jewels with boss names at the boss locations in the World.json logic mapping. (e.g. "Ankh Jewel (Fafnir)")
The LM2 Bepinex Mod will live patch the usability of Ankh Jewels for specific bosses.
- Death Link
This will trigger an instant death similar to casting all mantras without meeting all conditions.
The LM2 Bepinex Mod will separately have a toggle button to turn on/off Death Link in the main menu.
- AP Chest Color
You can now choose colors separately for LM2 non-filler chests, LM2 filler chests, and AP item chests.
The LM2 Bepinex Mod will live patch the AP item chest color based on the seed loaded in the server.

# Adjustments
- New filler items
While the seed writer still uses ChestWeight/FakeItem/NPCMoney/FakeScan for placing in-game filler, the filler needed to be able to be sent to the LM2 player from AP at any given time, non-location specific. As a result, the contents of the filler is automatically converted to one of the items below. Currently I have set these filler items to accommodate more purchasing power for AP items in shops.
*1 Coin
*10 Coins
*30 Coins
*50 Coins
*80 Coins
*100 Coins
*1 Weight
*5 Weights
*10 Weights
*20 Weights

- Shop prices
The dynamic sphere based shop price balancing is mostly maintained but I reduced the multiplier by half.
In addition, filler items in shops are free one time purchases instead of converted to [Weights]. 
Balancing might still be required.

# Issues
- Weights not being in the Starting Shop
- FillError due to not being able to get to the final boss as too many bosses were locked out in Entrance Randomization.
- FillError due to not enough locations available in the early spheres. 
- Untested options (I ported the functions but did not test yet)
- Death Link sometimes not sending out to other players (on AP BepInEx mod side)
- Debug log spam
v0.1.0.title: La-Mulana 2 APWorld v0.1.0

v0.1.1.description:
# Update Contents
- Added manifest for 0.7.0, built from source 0.6.7. 
- Renamed options containing 'option_random' due to Choice already having assigned 'random' to randomize between the Choice options.
- Fixed an issue where LocationType.Dialogue did not get NPCMoney filler IDs inside LM2
- Fixed an issue where Starting Shop items were not locked causing the shop to potentially not have weights.
(I had commented them out because I was having issues with full ER sphere 1 location pools, oops)
- YAML: Updated Echidna's list of choices.
v0.1.1.title: v0.1.1

v0.5.0.description:
# Update Contents
- Fixed shop items not always having at least 1 of any ammo kind before additional shuffle
- Fixed the Starting Shop not being recognized as AP locations (420240~420242)
- Set Crystal Skull as progression_skip_balancing to spread them throughout the spheres, opening up more room for progression items that unlock more locations.
- Adjusted Entrance Randomizer with additional conditions
  - Port of separate-pool pairing (horizontal/vertical/gates/unique)
  - Pre-seed sphere 1 cluster viability check (currently set at minimum 3 accessible regions, 15 locations of which 11 AP fillable)
  - Pre-seed GuardianKill softlock simulation
  - Restrict orphaned islands
  - Restrict self-looping exits (additionally added as a toggle option for legacy experience -- use at own risk)
v0.5.0.title: v0.5.0

v0.5.5.description:
# Update Contents
- Seed is now zipped as `seed.lm2r`, and can be directly downloaded from archipelago.gg when hosting through the AP zip
- Fixed an inconsistency with generated filler labels vs assigned internal LM2 IDs
- Shifted some of the coin/weight filler to lesser rewards for balancing purposes.
- Adding Bracelet / BronzeMirror / Codices / Harp to ItemClassification.Filler to improve filling balance.
- Fixed some typos in the World.json
v0.5.5.title: v0.5.5

v0.7.0.description:
# Update Contents
- The Bepinex mod now supports loading all seed data directly from AP. This means there is no more set up required for playing La-Mulana 2 AP, just connecting to the server with the Bepinex mod will automatically load up the seed in-game. For legacy purposes, seed writing can still be enabled as an option in the YAML. 
- Entrance randomizer generation has been refined through AP seed testing and rarely leads to a fill error in the current iteration (35 seeds in a row with mixed ER settings succeeded)
- Potsanity (WIP) added as a test. It will add the first 30 pots (Village of Departure, La-Mulana Ruins, Roots of Yggdrasil) as location checks. Trying to add all the pots first before creating lesser check heavy versions.
- options.py cleaned up so YAML template generation through the Archipelago tool is now possible.
- Made debug logging a toggle so the host doesn't get spoiled during seed generation.
v0.7.0.title: v0.7.0

v0.7.1.description:
# Update Contents
- Generating shop prices at post_fill stage so the generation doesn't crash during sphere calculation.
v0.7.1.title: v0.7.1

v0.7.2.description:
# Update Contents

## YAML format update required! (Now using the auto-generated YAML for future releases)

### Potsanity (WIP -- partial implementation)
  - Extended to Annwfn (+18), total 49 checks.
  - Note: Currently, filler in pots can only be in otherworld or in pots specifically.
  - Made sure there is enough space for the remaining 250 additional checks in the ID enumeration. Soon (tm)
  - Fixed pots not correctly writing progressive items to seed (game defaulted to Shield1/Whip1 etc. in pots causing flag overlap)
### Options:
  - Fixed mantra_placement (original) and shop_placement (original) resolving too early and always breaking the seed 
  - Fixed Maps & Mapping Software starting item bundle
  - Fixed Excess Crystal Skull option (I forgor 💀)
  - Fixed GuardianKills option (maximum was set to 8 instead of 9, whoops)
  - Fixed some phrasing in the options to make the automated yaml easier to understand.
  - Combined StartingArea and StartingWeapon into a choice which support AP weightage
    - If a StartingArea is picked while the ER prerequisite is not enabled, will try to pick from the remaining options without weightage. If there are no valid options, will fallback to Village of Departure start.
### Logic:
  - Reverting Nidhogg's logic, in preparation for a new `tricky` logic category (wip), keeping the more intuitive logic as `standard`
  - Added HorizontalAttack to some areas to avoid getting softlocked on a pot blocking the way, or being unable to open chests.
  - Fixed a pre-emptive multiworld sweep that would break generation if other worlds did not initialize connect_entrances yet.
### Entrance Randomizer:
  - Previously: Starting regions that only have 1 exit will not be linked to a dead end region (such as Endless Corridor, Cliff, Nibiru, etc.)
  - Now: _**All**_ starting regions' exits will not be linked to a dead end region.
  - It might not guarantee a larger sphere 1, but it filters out some bad scenarios that could break seeds 
    - In particular, Takamagahara Shrine starts with its free connector to Divine Fortress or Heaven's Labyrinth lead to frequent softlocks. 
  - Data: Ran Eijebong's fuzzer with anything randomized except for [accessibility: items][mantra_placement:2][shop_placement:2][guardian_specific_ankhs:1][prevent_self_loops:1]. Result: 463/500 (92.6% success rate) Most of these (28) were early caught exceptions: not enough reachable areas in the starting sphere. Other Fill errors happened in the backside starts with limited ER settings. So, turning on most if not all ER switches is strongly recommended.
v0.7.2.title: v0.7.2

v0.7.2a.description:
# Update Contents
- If `random_dissonance: true` and `soul_gate_entrances: true` and `include_nine_soul_gates: true` and ` random_soul_gate_value: true`:
  - Spiral Boat soul gate pair will always try to match the player set `required_guardians` number, rounded down to [1,2,3,5,9]. 
  - `required_guardians: 0` will set the soul gate value to [1] as 0-value soul gates have not been implemented yet.
v0.7.2a.title: v0.7.2a

v0.7.3.description:
# Update Contents
- Offline Mode: Writing a seed now creates a .lm2r (backwards compatible) and .lm2ap file (additional AP only settings)
  Solo potsanity can now be played without having to be connected to AP.
- Logic update: IB Bifrost -> IB Top Left is now considered accessible in logic with Holy Grail
- Soul Gate Values can now be shuffled without the gates themselves being shuffled.
- Item Groups & Location Groups added for hinting: 
  - Weapons, Subweapons, Maps, Research, Ammo, Skulls, Ankh Jewels, Mantras, Sacred Orbs, Software, Sigils
  - Dissonance, Bosses, Murals, Shops, Regions
v0.7.3.title: v0.7.3

v0.7.4.description:
# Update Notes
Made the Charon QoL an option in the YAML.

If you already have your YAML, this is the added portion:

```yaml
  greedy_charon:
    # AP coin grants can be sent by another player at any point, 
    # which may not be ideal in synced playthroughs. 
    # Turning this on will make Charon take all your coins as payment, 
    # so you don't get bricked with additional coins while trying to get to Charon.
    'false': 0
    'true': 50
```
v0.7.4.title: v0.7.4
